verses.latin_vulgate: Canticum ipsi David, quando domus ædificabatur post captivitatem.   Cantate Domino canticum novum ;  cantate Domino omnis terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁ֣ירוּ לַ֭יהֹוָה שִׁ֣יר חָדָ֑שׁ שִׁ֥ירוּ לַ֝יהֹוָ֗ה כׇּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: O sing unto the Lord a new song: sing unto the Lord, all the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cantate Domino, et benedicite nomini ejus ;  annuntiate de die in diem salutare ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁ֣ירוּ לַ֭יהֹוָה בָּרְכ֣וּ שְׁמ֑וֹ בַּשְּׂר֥וּ מִיּֽוֹם־לְ֝י֗וֹם יְשׁוּעָתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Sing unto the Lord, bless his name; shew forth his salvation from day to day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Annuntiate inter gentes gloriam ejus ;  in omnibus populis mirabilia ejus.
verses.king_james: Declare his glory among the heathen, his wonders among all people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam magnus Dominus, et laudabilis nimis :  terribilis est super omnes deos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֥י־גָ֘ד֤וֹל יְהֹוָ֣ה וּמְהֻלָּ֣ל מְאֹ֑ד נוֹרָ֥א ה֝֗וּא עַל־כׇּל־אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.king_james: For the Lord is great, and greatly to be praised: he is to be feared above all gods.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam omnes dii gentium dæmonia ;  Dominus autem cælos fecit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י ׀ כׇּל־אֱלֹהֵ֣י הָעַמִּ֣ים אֱלִילִ֑ים וַ֝יהֹוָ֗ה שָׁמַ֥יִם עָשָֽׂה׃
verses.king_james: For all the gods of the nations are idols: but the Lord made the heavens.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confessio et pulchritudo in conspectu ejus ;  sanctimonia et magnificentia in sanctificatione ejus.
verses.king_james: Honour and majesty are before him: strength and beauty are in his sanctuary.

verses.latin_vulgate: Afferte Domino, patriæ gentium,  afferte Domino gloriam et honorem ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָב֣וּ לַ֭יהֹוָה מִשְׁפְּח֣וֹת עַמִּ֑ים הָב֥וּ לַ֝יהֹוָ֗ה כָּב֥וֹד וָעֹֽז׃
verses.king_james: Give unto the Lord, O ye kindreds of the people, give unto the Lord glory and strength.

verses.latin_vulgate: afferte Domino gloriam nomini ejus.  Tollite hostias, et introite in atria ejus ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָב֣וּ לַ֭יהֹוָה כְּב֣וֹד שְׁמ֑וֹ שְׂאֽוּ־מִ֝נְחָ֗ה וּבֹ֥אוּ לְחַצְרוֹתָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Give unto the Lord the glory due unto his name: bring an offering, and come into his courts.

verses.latin_vulgate: adorate Dominum in atrio sancto ejus.  Commoveatur a facie ejus universa terra ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִשְׁתַּחֲו֣וּ לַ֭יהֹוָה בְּהַדְרַת־קֹ֑דֶשׁ חִ֥ילוּ מִ֝פָּנָ֗יו כׇּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: O worship the Lord in the beauty of holiness: fear before him, all the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: dicite in gentibus, quia Dominus regnavit.  Etenim correxit orbem terræ, qui non commovebitur ;  judicabit populos in æquitate.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִמְר֤וּ בַגּוֹיִ֨ם ׀ יְ֘הֹוָ֤ה מָלָ֗ךְ אַף־תִּכּ֣וֹן תֵּ֭בֵל בַּל־תִּמּ֑וֹט יָדִ֥ין עַ֝מִּ֗ים בְּמֵישָׁרִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Say among the heathen that the Lord reigneth: the world also shall be established that it shall not be moved: he shall judge the people righteously.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lætentur cæli, et exsultet terra ;  commoveatur mare et plenitudo ejus ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִשְׂמְח֣וּ הַ֭שָּׁמַיִם וְתָגֵ֣ל הָאָ֑רֶץ יִֽרְעַ֥ם הַ֝יָּ֗ם וּמְלֹאֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Let the heavens rejoice, and let the earth be glad; let the sea roar, and the fulness thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: gaudebunt campi, et omnia quæ in eis sunt.  Tunc exsultabunt omnia ligna silvarum
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַעֲלֹ֣ז שָׂ֭דַי וְכׇל־אֲשֶׁר־בּ֑וֹ אָ֥ז יְ֝רַנְּנ֗וּ כׇּל־עֲצֵי־יָֽעַר׃
verses.king_james: Let the field be joyful, and all that is therein: then shall all the trees of the wood rejoice

verses.latin_vulgate: a facie Domini, quia venit,  quoniam venit judicare terram.  Judicabit orbem terræ in æquitate,  et populos in veritate sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִפְנֵ֤י יְהֹוָ֨ה ׀ כִּ֬י בָ֗א כִּ֥י בָא֮ לִשְׁפֹּ֢ט הָ֫אָ֥רֶץ יִשְׁפֹּֽט־תֵּבֵ֥ל בְּצֶ֑דֶק וְ֝עַמִּ֗ים בֶּאֱמוּנָתֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Before the Lord: for he cometh, for he cometh to judge the earth: he shall judge the world with righteousness, and the people with his truth.
